title: Agent Flight Recorder
description: Token cost, failure rate, counterfactual replay matrix, and investigator confidence for the support agent.

widgets.title: LLM tokens per step (by service)
widgets.description: sum of llm.tokens on llm.chat spans; the token cost of every agent, replay, and investigation step

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS ts, `resource_string_service$$name` AS service, sum(attributes_number['llm.tokens']) AS tokens FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE name = 'llm.chat' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY ts, service ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: Agent tool failure rate
widgets.description: share of tool.* spans ending in ERROR

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS ts, countIf(status_code_string = 'Error') / count() AS failure_rate FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE name LIKE 'tool.%' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: Replay success matrix (latest run per config)
widgets.description: counterfactual configs vs outcome; cf-5 carries the structural fix

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT attributes_string['replay.config_id'] AS config, argMax(attributes_string['replay.model'], timestamp) AS model, argMax(attributes_number['replay.temperature'], timestamp) AS temperature, argMax(attributes_bool['replay.fix_applied'], timestamp) AS fix_applied, argMax(attributes_bool['replay.success'], timestamp) AS success FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE name = 'replay_run' GROUP BY config ORDER BY config

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS ts, max(attributes_number['investigation.confidence']) AS confidence FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE name = 'investigation' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts
